internships.name: Full Stack Web Development (MERN/Java)
internships.detail: Build high-performance, responsive industry-scale architectures. Work on JWT security filters, Docker deployment sheets, and custom UI components.

taskSheets.title: Task 1: Build a Responsive Dynamic Dashboard with Vite
taskSheets.description: Design a bento-style analytics interface with custom Tailwind UI. Read and format server metrics from API files.

taskSheets.title: Task 2: Implement Real-Time Secure Express JWT Middleware
taskSheets.description: Create access filters, local token validation protocols, and custom cookie parsing configurations.

taskSheets.title: Task 3: Connect Relational SQL Operations
taskSheets.description: Design schema migration pipelines, execute indexed column queries, and prevent injection vulnerabilities.

taskSheets.title: Task 4: Production Hosting & Asset Serving Optimization
taskSheets.description: Deploy with custom reverse proxy configurations, compress static resources, and configure container ingress routing.

internships.name: Advanced Data Science & Machine Learning
internships.detail: Engage in actual corporate dataset modeling, clean tabular data, configure classification nodes, and render interactive D3 dashboards.

taskSheets.title: Task 1: Dynamic Data Engineering Pipeline
taskSheets.description: Aggregate raw JSON data streams, resolve missing null nodes programmatically, and calculate weighted averages.

taskSheets.title: Task 2: Custom Supervised Classification Algorithm
taskSheets.description: Implement decision regression metrics, calculate precision-recall, and build dynamic evaluation plots.

taskSheets.title: Task 3: Beautiful Interactive D3 Layouts
taskSheets.description: Build scalable cluster distributions, scatter plots with smooth transition paths, and responsive axis charts.

internships.name: Cloud Native DevOps & Orchestration
internships.detail: Master Kubernetes orchestration sheets, configure Nginx reverse routes, set up CD runners, and deploy mock clusters.

taskSheets.title: Task 1: Advanced Docker Isolation and Layers
taskSheets.description: Write lightweight multi-stage configurations, avoid runtime execution vulnerabilities, and map secure ports.

taskSheets.title: Task 2: Kubernetes Orchestration & Target Health
taskSheets.description: Implement safe rolling restart sheets, set up readiness checks, and map hostnames.

taskSheets.title: Task 3: automated GitHub Actions Integration
taskSheets.description: Formulate complete lint, compile, and artifact delivery cycles securely.

tasks.taskTitle: Task 1: Build a Responsive Dynamic Dashboard with Vite
tasks.submittedText: Completed dashboard using Tailwind CSS grid layouts and clean SVG graphs.
tasks.feedback: Outstanding layouts, correct typography, and completely fluid resizing triggers! Keep up the brilliant visual polish!

tasks.taskTitle: Task 2: Implement Real-Time Secure Express JWT Middleware
tasks.submittedText: Implemented standard Express middleware with authentication filters.

emailLogs.subject: Deltaclause Enrollment Approved - Welcome to Full Stack Web Development (MERN/Java)!
emailLogs.body:
Greetings Aarav Sharma,

We are absolutely thrilled to inform you that your UPI payment has been successfully reviewed and verified! Your training materials, sftp guidelines, and design task configurations are attached in the welcome PDF material booklet.

You can access your student dashboard directly on our platform:
https://deltaclause.com/dashboard

Task guidelines & SFTP resources code is attached.

Best of Luck,
Team Deltaclause Operations
